meta.title: ICS Botnetage
meta.description:
Erik Schweigert of Belden and Sean McBride of FireEye covered a lot in this session:

- Timeline and key dates on scanning the Internet for ICS devices
- Mirai and other IoT botnets
- Motivations and techniques to use a botnet to specifically attack an ICS
- How Mirai could easily be modified to attack ICS given existing published code
- How Tofino and other ICS protocol aware security devices can stop those attacks

Highly recommend you take a look at the chart and explanation at 21:55. Sean has attack characteristics on the y axis and uses on the x axis, and the chart shows where certain attack characteristics offer the best benefit to an attack goal.
